<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead">
## Issue: kapow-y6sc — Detail card: institution name shown twice at top

The detail card view shows the institution name twice at the top. Remove the duplicate — likely one is from the modal title and one from the card content.

## WORKTREE SETUP — RUN FIRST
Before doing anything else, create and enter an isolated worktree:
```bash
REPO_ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
BRANCH_NAME="worktree/detail-card-fix"
WORKTREE_DIR="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/worktrees/$BRANCH_NAME"

if [ -d "$WORKTREE_DIR" ]; then
  echo "Worktree already exists, reusing"
else
  git worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$BRANCH_NAME"
fi

cd "$WORKTREE_DIR"
```
Verify you are in the right place:
```bash
echo "CWD: $(pwd)"
echo "Branch: $(git branch --show-current)"
echo "$(pwd)" | grep -q '\.claude/worktrees/' && echo "WORKTREE VERIFIED" || echo "FATAL: NOT in a worktree"
```
If verification fails, STOP and report the error to the team lead.

ALL subsequent commands must run from this worktree directory.
NEVER cd back to the main repo directory. Commit and push ONLY on
your worktree branch — never touch main.

When done, push your branch:
```bash
git push -u origin HEAD
```

## Approach

1. Find the detail card / modal component in `web/src/` — look for components related to institution detail, modal, or card detail view
2. Identify where the institution name is rendered twice (likely modal title + card header)
3. Remove one of the duplicates — keep whichever one makes more design sense

## Quality Gate (must pass before reporting done)

```bash
# From worktree root:
cd web && pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm test
```

## Instructions
- Follow CLAUDE.md and web/CLAUDE.md conventions
- Use Mantine style props, not Tailwind
- Minimal change — just remove the duplicate, don't redesign the component
- Update tests if the removed element was being tested
- Commit your work on the worktree branch with a descriptive message
- Report back with quality gate results when done

</teammate-message>

Perfect! I found the duplicate institution name rendering. Here's my analysis:

## Finding: Duplicate Institution Name in InstitutionDetail Modal

**Location:** `/home/ketan/project/kapow/web/src/components/search/InstitutionDetail.tsx`

**The Problem:**

The institution name appears **twice**:

1. **Modal title (line 179):** 
   ```tsx
   <Modal
     title={inst?.name ?? 'Institution Details'}
   >
   ```

2. **Card header content (lines 191-193):**
   ```tsx
   <div>
     <Text size="lg" fw={700} c="brand.9">
       {inst.name}
     </Text>
   ```

**Visual Result:**
- The modal window shows the institution name in the header/title bar
- Then the same institution name is rendered again as the first element in the modal body with the same content ("Institution Name" followed by "City, State" on the next line)

**Why This is a Bug:**
The modal's `title` prop already displays the institution name prominently in the header. Repeating it as the first line of content inside the modal body is redundant and creates visual clutter.

**Recommended Fix:**
Remove the header `<div>` block (lines 190-197) that contains the duplicate name and location rendering, since that information is already present in the modal title. The modal starts directly with the detailed information grid.

**Related Code:**
- Lines 190-197 contain the redundant header block
- The `SimpleGrid` starting at line 199 contains all the actual institution detail data that should remain

This matches task #4 in the task list: "Fix duplicate institution name in detail card"
